explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: short-rib thoracic dysplasia 8 with or without polydactyly Description: An asphyxiating thoracic dystrophy that has material basis in compound heterozygous mutation in the WDR60 gene on chromosome 7q36. Phenotypes: Ambiguous genitalia; Macrocephaly; Short ribs; Narrow chest; Lateral clavicl
